exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your grief loss forward
items: Create a comprehensive list of important legal and financial documents to locate and organize
Research and contact 3-5 grief counselors or support groups in your area
Schedule and attend an appointment with your doctor to discuss how grief may be affecting your physical health
Read and identify which of the 5 stages of grief you are currently experiencing
Create a simple daily routine that includes at least one self-care activity and one meaningful connection
Identify and contact 2-3 trusted people who can serve as your primary support system during this time
